title: Commencement of prescription anew following attempt to restore or secure new production
doc_html:
§41.  Commencement of prescription anew following attempt to restore or secure new production

When prescription is interrupted, it commences anew from the last day on which operations are conducted in good faith to secure or restore production in paying quantities with reasonable expectation of success.  

Acts 1974, No. 50, §41, eff. Jan. 1, 1975.
doc_text:
§41.  Commencement of prescription anew following attempt to restore or secure new production
When prescription is interrupted, it commences anew from the last day on which operations are conducted in good faith to secure or restore production in paying quantities with reasonable expectation of success.
Acts 1974, No. 50, §41, eff. Jan. 1, 1975.
